title: Busy weekend in Türkiye for Baiba Braže
summary_full: From 17 to 19 April 2026, Latvian Minister of Foreign Affairs Baiba Braže was paying a working visit to Türkiye, where she participated in the 5th Antalya Diplomacy Forum.
summary_public: From 17 to 19 April 2026, Latvian Minister of Foreign Affairs Baiba Braže was paying a working visit to Türkiye, where she participated in the 5th Antalya Diplomacy Forum.
